 LSM1x0A_LoRaWAN (LSM1x0A_Controller *controller)
 Intializes the LoRaWAN API wrapper.

 Sets the LoRaWAN Device EUI (DevEUI).

 Sets the LoRaWAN Application EUI (JoinEUI).

 Sets the LoRaWAN Application Key (AppKey).
 
bool setNwkKey (const char *nwkKey)
 Sets the LoRaWAN Network Key (NwkKey).
 
bool setDevAddr (const char *devAddr)
 Sets the LoRaWAN Device Address (DevAddr) for ABP mode.
 
bool setAppSKey (const char *appSKey)
 Sets the Application Session Key (AppSKey) for ABP mode.
 
bool setNwkSKey (const char *nwkSKey)
 Sets the Network Session Key (NwkSKey) for ABP mode.
 
bool setNwkID (int nwkId)
 Sets the LoRaWAN Network ID (NetID).
 
bool setBaudrate (uint32_t baudrate)
 Configures the module's baudrate (default is usually 9600).
 
bool setBand (LsmBand band)
 Sets the LoRaWAN operational frequency band.
 
bool setClass (LsmClass lorawanClass)
 Sets the LoRaWAN device Class (A or C).
 
bool setADR (bool enabled)
 Enables or disables Adaptive Data Rate (ADR).
 
bool setDataRate (LsmDataRate dr)
 Sets the Data Rate (DR) of the module.
 
bool setDutyCycle (bool enabled)
 Enables or disables the Duty Cycle limitation (EU regions mostly).
 
bool setRx1Delay (int delayMs)
 Sets the delay for the RX1 receive window.
 
bool setRx2Delay (int delayMs)
 Sets the delay for the RX2 receive window.
 
bool setRx2DataRate (LsmDataRate dr)
 Sets the Data Rate (DR) specifically for the RX2 window.
 
bool setRx2Frequency (int freqHz)
 Sets the precise frequency for the RX2 window.
 
bool setJoin1Delay (int delayMs)
 Sets the delay for the Join1 receive window.
 
bool setJoin2Delay (int delayMs)
 Sets the delay for the Join2 receive window.
 
bool setTxPower (LsmTxPower power)
 Sets the transmission power index.
 
bool setPingSlot (LsmPingSlot slot)
 Configures the Ping Slot periodicity (Class B / Custom usage).
 
bool setNetworkType (LsmNetworkType type)
 Sets the network type (Public vs Private).
 
bool setConfirmRetry (int retries)
 Configures the number of retries for Confirmed uplinks.
 
bool setUnconfirmRetry (int retries)
 Configures the number of repetitions for Unconfirmed uplinks.
 
bool setChannelMask (LsmBand band, uint16_t subBandMask=LsmSubBand::SUB_BAND_ALL)
 Enables or disables specific sub-bands for regions supporting Channel Masks (e.g., US915, AU915).
 
bool setDevNonce (int nonce)
 Sets the DevNonce manually.
 
bool resetDevNonce ()
 Resets the DevNonce counter to zero.
 
bool setAbpFrameCounter (uint32_t fcnt)
 Forcibly sets the ABP frame counter value.
 
bool setJoinMode (LsmJoinMode mode)
 Sets the join mode (OTAA vs ABP).
 
bool join (LsmJoinMode joinMode, uint32_t timeoutMs=60000)
 Initiates a LoRaWAN Network Join procedure. This is a blocking function until the module fires an event or times out.
 
bool sendData (uint8_t port, const char *data, bool confirmed=false, uint32_t timeoutMs=0)
 Transmits a payload through the LoRaWAN network. Blocks until the MAC layer confirms transmission (or reception if confirmed).
 
bool requestLinkCheck ()
 Requests a Link Check MAC command on the next uplink.
 
bool setRfTestConfig (long freqHz, int power, int bw, int sf_dr, int cr, int lna)
 Configures fundamental parameters for RF testing.
 
bool startTxTest (int packets)
 Starts transmitting test packets.
 
bool startRxTest (int packets)
 Starts receiving test packets.
 
bool startTxTone ()
 Emits a continuous Continuous Wave (CW) tone on the TX path.
 
bool startRxRssiTone ()
 Listens and measures RSSI on the configured frequency.
 
bool stopTest ()
 Stops any ongoing RF Test or Tone operation.
 
bool setCertificationMode (LsmJoinMode mode)
 Enters LoRaWAN certification mode.
 
bool startTxHoppingTest (long fStart, long fStop, long fDelta, int packets)
 Executes a Tx Frequency Hopping test.
 
bool startContinuousModulationTx ()
 Transmits a continuous modulated LoRa signal.
 
bool startContinuousModulationRx ()
 Receives a continuous modulated LoRa signal.
 
bool sendCertificationPacket ()
 Sends a predefined LoRaWAN certification packet.

 Pushes the RAM-cached variables back down into the hardware module. Restores the operational state after an unhandled hardware reset.
 
bool loadConfigFromModule ()
 Polls the module for all its properties and populates the internal RAM cache. Recommended after waking up from deep sleep to synchronize states.
 
void clearCache ()
 Wipes the internal state cache, forcing a clean slate for future read/writes.

 Validates if the device is currently Joined to the network. (Either confirmed by OTAA or statically assumed by ABP).
 
void setJoined (bool joined)
 Manually overrides the internal joined state tracker.

 Attempts to recover a lost connection (re-executes OTAA Join if dropped).

Detailed Description

Submódulo de configuración y operación LoRaWAN del LSM1x0A.

Separa la lógica de comandos LoRaWAN (Setters, Getters, Operación) para evitar sobrecargar el Controller principal (antipatrón God Object).

Definition at line 22 of file LSM1x0A_LoRaWAN.h.

◆ join()

bool LSM1x0A_LoRaWAN::join ( LsmJoinMode joinMode,
uint32_t timeoutMs = 60000 )

Initiates a LoRaWAN Network Join procedure. This is a blocking function until the module fires an event or times out.

Parameters
joinModeWhether to join via OTAA or ABP.
timeoutMsMaximum wait time for the join event (default 60s).
Returns
true if joined successfully, false on timeout or denial.

◆ sendData()

bool LSM1x0A_LoRaWAN::sendData ( uint8_t port,
const char * data,
bool confirmed = false,
uint32_t timeoutMs = 0 )

Transmits a payload through the LoRaWAN network. Blocks until the MAC layer confirms transmission (or reception if confirmed).

Parameters
portThe LoRaWAN application port (1-223).
dataThe payload formatted as a Hexadecimal string.
confirmedTrue to require an ACK from the Network Server, False for "fire and forget".
timeoutMsOptional custom timeout (useful for slow DRs).
Returns
true if transmitted successfully.
